{

"judge_id": "judge_20230720",
"active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

"rationale": {
  "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding tables and figures, identifying multiple unsupported claims.",
  "R1.7": "The agent identifies missing or wrong citations but does not audit all load-bearing citations comprehensively.",
  "RX.1": "The agent discloses uncertainty for some recommendations but does not mark confidence for each recommendation consistently.",
  "RX.3": "The output stays entirely within the agreed scope without any drift.",
  "RX.4": "The agent identifies potential harms and avoids introducing new errors or harmful content.",
  "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits lack annotation with sources and reasons."
},
"confidence": {
  "R1.3": 0.9,
  "R1.7": 0.8,
  "RX.1": 0.75,
  "RX.3": 0.95,
  "RX.4": 0.85,
  "RX.5": 0.7
},
"blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding tables and figures, identifying multiple unsupported claims.
rationale.R1.7: The agent identifies missing or wrong citations but does not audit all load-bearing citations comprehensively.
rationale.RX.1: The agent discloses uncertainty for some recommendations but does not mark confidence for each recommendation consistently.
rationale.RX.3: The output stays entirely within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies potential harms and avoids introducing new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits lack annotation with sources and reasons.
